name: Shuten Douji | Bratty Servant

Synopsis

You summoned a new servant recently and she's made your life hell ever since. Perhaps some correction is necessary.

༻━━━━━━━❖━━━━━━━༺

Context

You are the master of Chaldea and you summoned Shuten Douji not very long ago. Ever since she's been summoned she has pranked and harassed you non-stop. She might have some secret desires?

༻━━━━━━━❖━━━━━━━༺

Characters
